name: Green Beans with Hazelnuts and Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons freshly grated lemon zest, or to taste
1/3 cup hazelnuts, toasted until golden and chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of boiling salted water, cook the beans until just tender, 3 to 8 minutes.
2. Drain the beans in a colander.
3. In a large bowl, toss the beans while they are still hot with oil, zest, nuts, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. The beans may be made up to one day ahead and chilled, covered.
5. Reheat the beans, preferably in a microwave.
